response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the provided JSON reference for 'Mela!' and 'Seiza ni Naretara'. Used on-screen text to confirm song titles and credits. Discarded unused lyrics from the reference JSON as the video contains specific cut-down segments. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, with mid-sentence splits applied for audible pauses.

subtitles.original: かっこいい君には
subtitles.english: To the cool you...

subtitles.original: 僕じゃ頼りないのかなんて
subtitles.english: I wonder if I'm unreliable.

subtitles.original: そりゃそうだよな だって
subtitles.english: That's right, because...

subtitles.original: 今もこうして迷ってる
subtitles.english: even now I'm hesitating like this.

subtitles.original: 手を取ってくれないか
subtitles.english: Won't you take my hand?

subtitles.original: ギブとテイクさ
subtitles.english: It's give and take.

subtitles.original: 君が僕のヒーローだったように
subtitles.english: Just like you were my hero.

subtitles.original: 今なんじゃない？ メラメラとたぎれ
subtitles.english: Isn't it now? Burning and boiling up!

subtitles.original: こんな僕にも潜む正義が
subtitles.english: There's a sense of justice hiding even in me.

subtitles.original: どうしようもない 衝動に駆られて
subtitles.english: Driven by an uncontrollable impulse,

subtitles.original: ほら気づけば手を握っている
subtitles.english: look, I'm holding your hand before I knew it.

subtitles.original: 一体全体そんなに荷物を
subtitles.english: Just what in the world, with all that baggage,

subtitles.original: 背負い込んでどこへ行くの
subtitles.english: where are you going carrying it all?

subtitles.original: ねえねえ待って 僕にちょっと
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, wait, to me, just a bit...

subtitles.original: 預けてみては
subtitles.english: try entrusting it.

subtitles.original: 信じてばかりの僕と
subtitles.english: Me, who only ever believes,

subtitles.original: 信じることが怖い君と
subtitles.english: and you, who is afraid of believing.

subtitles.original: どちらが正しいのかなんて
subtitles.english: Which of us is right,

subtitles.original: 誰にも分からないさ
subtitles.english: no one can really say.

subtitles.original: 僕らだけの世界
subtitles.english: In a world just for us.

subtitles.original: ギブとテイクさ
subtitles.english: It's give and take.

subtitles.original: 補い合えた暁には
subtitles.english: In the dawn when we can complement each other,

subtitles.original: 同じ夢を見たい
subtitles.english: I want to see the same dream.

subtitles.original: 君はかっこいいと苦しめて
subtitles.english: I made you suffer by saying you're cool,

subtitles.original: ひとりぼっちにさせたのは
subtitles.english: and making you all alone...

subtitles.original: 少し僕のせいなんだよな ごめんね
subtitles.english: was a little bit my fault, I'm sorry.

subtitles.original: だけど見るべきリアルだ
subtitles.english: But it's the reality we must face.

subtitles.original: 今こそ僕が助けるんだ
subtitles.english: Now is when I'll save you!

subtitles.original: 抱えないで 信じて頼ってほしいんだ
subtitles.english: Don't carry it alone, I want you to trust and rely on me.

subtitles.original: 今なんじゃない？ メラメラとたぎる
subtitles.english: Isn't it now? Burning and boiling up,

subtitles.original: こんな僕にも潜む正義が
subtitles.english: there's a sense of justice hiding even in me.

subtitles.original: どうしようもない 衝動に駆られて
subtitles.english: Driven by an uncontrollable impulse,

subtitles.original: ほら気づけば手を握っている
subtitles.english: look, I'm holding your hand before I knew it.

subtitles.original: 放っておけないそんなに荷物を
subtitles.english: I can't leave you alone with all that baggage,

subtitles.original: 背負い込んでどこへ行くの
subtitles.english: where are you going carrying it all?

subtitles.original: ほんのちょっと 僕にちょっと
subtitles.english: Just a little, to me, just a bit...

subtitles.original: 預けてみては
subtitles.english: try entrusting it.

subtitles.original: こんな僕も君のヒーローになりたいのさ
subtitles.english: I want to be your hero too.

subtitles.original: 星座になれたら
subtitles.english: If I Could Become a Constellation

subtitles.original: もうすぐ時計は6時
subtitles.english: Soon the clock will strike six.

subtitles.original: もうそこに一番星
subtitles.english: The first star is already appearing there.

subtitles.original: 影を踏んで夜に紛れたくなる帰り道
subtitles.english: On the way home, I want to step on shadows and blend into the night.

subtitles.original: どんなに探してみても
subtitles.english: No matter how much I search,

subtitles.original: ひとつしかない星
subtitles.english: there is only one star.

subtitles.original: 何億光年離れたところから
subtitles.english: From hundreds of millions of light-years away,

subtitles.original: あんなに輝く
subtitles.english: it shines so brightly.

subtitles.original: いいな 君は
subtitles.english: Must be nice, you're...

subtitles.original: みんなから愛されて
subtitles.english: ...loved by everyone.

subtitles.original: いいや 僕は
ずっとひとりきりさ
subtitles.english: ...always been all alone.

subtitles.original: 君と集まって星座になれたら
subtitles.english: If I could gather with you and become a constellation,

subtitles.original: 星降る夜 一瞬の願い事
subtitles.english: a wish in a moment on a night of falling stars.

subtitles.original: 煌めいて 揺らめいて
subtitles.english: Sparkling, swaying.
